name: public_safety_workplace_injury_spike_southport_tru_loy
premise: A citywide alert system misfired twice in an hour; dispatch is debating whether to silence automated pushes or risk cry-wolf fatigue. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety workplace injury spike southport tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The trade is not abstract: it is truth versus loyalty under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Amina Petrov
agents.identity: I am Amina Petrov, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Darius Mensah
agents.identity: I am Darius Mensah, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so loyalty does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so truth does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Amina Petrov must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Amina Petrov do?
